notes: Phase F authored orientation overlays for redesigned book pages (Phase G). Do not duplicate titles, covers, summaries, or download URLs. selectedConceptIds must exist on the book when the book has concepts; empty is allowed when the graph lists none.

overviews.centralQuestion: How do we stay curious when easy certainty would feel safer?
overviews.whyItExists: Curiosity Before Certainty is a friendly doorway into the project. It argues for disciplined curiosity as a learning and leadership posture when premature certainty hides complexity and weakens judgment.
overviews.audience: Readers who want an approachable entry before denser systems or leadership volumes — including newcomers to After Certainty.
nonGoals: It does not offer a complete epistemology or a replacement ideology.
It does not treat curiosity as endless delay of decision.

overviews.centralQuestion: How can serious systems improve under pressure without waiting for perfect information?
overviews.whyItExists: This handbook gathers disciplines for learning in motion — for teams and institutions that must act, revise, and remain answerable when certainty is unavailable.
overviews.audience: Leaders, engineers, operators, and institutional practitioners who need practical learning postures rather than abstract theory alone.
nonGoals: It is not a project-management methodology cookbook.
It does not promise that better process eliminates moral conflict.

overviews.centralQuestion: How can trust remain possible across difference and disagreement?
overviews.whyItExists: Trust Beyond Similarity explores why trust becomes more valuable — not less — when perspectives diverge, and what makes cooperation across partial views durable.
overviews.audience: Readers concerned with civic life, teams across disagreement, and relationships where sameness cannot be the price of trust.
nonGoals: It does not claim all disagreement is healthy or all difference should be preserved.
It does not reduce trust to a single metric or reputation score.

overviews.centralQuestion: How do we judge responsibly when every perspective is partial?
overviews.whyItExists: What We Cannot See introduces finite perspective, bias, and integration — why no one sees the whole, and why groups still need accountable judgment.
overviews.audience: Readers who want a clear map of perspective limits before entering denser systems or leadership books.
nonGoals: It does not treat all viewpoints as equally warranted.
It does not dissolve individual responsibility into collective process.

overviews.centralQuestion: What happens when a civilization-sized blind spot can only be seen one perspective at a time?
overviews.whyItExists: The Relay is a fiction doorway into the same terrain: uncertainty, participation, and coordination when no courier holds the complete map.
overviews.audience: Readers who prefer story as an entry into the project’s questions about meaning, responsibility, and shared work.
nonGoals: It is not a treatise or handbook disguised as a novel.
It does not settle the project’s nonfiction arguments by plot alone.

overviews.centralQuestion: Why is love something everyone recognizes yet struggles to explain?
overviews.whyItExists: Everyone Knows Love treats care as a living mystery rather than a formula — a human-scale entry into recognition, obligation, and language that arrives too late.
overviews.audience: Readers seeking the most intimate doorway into After Certainty’s concerns with meaning, care, and incomplete explanation.
nonGoals: It does not offer a clinical or theological definition of love.
It does not replace the project’s civic and systems volumes.

overviews.centralQuestion: How do we live and judge when understanding is not enough?
overviews.whyItExists: After Certainty is the project’s namesake orientation: judgment, responsibility, and participation once explanation reaches its limits and replacement frameworks will not save us.
overviews.audience: Readers ready for the capstone thesis — including those arriving from curiosity, perspective, trust, or systems doorways.
nonGoals: It does not install a new totalizing certainty in place of the old one.
It does not claim that abandoning certainty means abandoning standards.

overviews.centralQuestion: How do connection and separation in systems shape responsibility over time?
overviews.whyItExists: Coupling offers a practical architecture for seeing where systems are tightly joined, where they drift, and how those choices distribute consequence and accountability.
overviews.audience: Systems thinkers, architects, and practitioners who need a concrete lens on cohesion, drift, and designed friction.
nonGoals: It is not a software-only coupling guide, though software examples appear.
It does not treat decoupling as always virtuous.

overviews.centralQuestion: How does meaning form, harden, and stay revisable before anyone is obviously wrong?
overviews.whyItExists: How Meaning Moves traces Signal, Compression, and Restraint — and Connection as the through-line — so readers can see interpretation at work while sentences still feel open.
overviews.audience: Readers interested in communication, interpretation, and the pace of understanding across people and institutions.
nonGoals: It does not reduce disagreement to messaging technique.
It does not claim perfect shared meaning is achievable.

overviews.centralQuestion: How does leadership influence form, renew, and erode when others look to you?
overviews.whyItExists: When Others Look to You is a field guide to renewal and erosion in leadership — how trust is practiced, how responsibility drifts, and how influence stays answerable.
overviews.audience: Leaders and people who hold informal influence — including readers arriving from systems, trust, or handbook doorways.
nonGoals: It is not a personality-cult or charisma manual.
The companion edition is parallel enrichment, not a replacement for this primary volume.
